title: Implement mobile QR book lookup endpoint
goal: Allow the mobile app to scan a QR code and retrieve the matching book details.
implementation_steps: Validate query parameter code as required string.
Find the book where books.isbn equals the scanned code.
If code is missing, return validation error 422.
If no book is found, return 404 JSON with message 'Book not found for this QR code.'.
Use the existing Book model appended values for image_url, qr_url, status, and available_quantity.
If authenticated user role is admin or librarian, include recent transactions for the book.
If authenticated user role is borrower, exclude transaction history.

query.code: required string; QR content; matches books.isbn

recent_transactions_rules: Only include recent_transactions for admin and librarian.
Limit recent_transactions to the 5 latest records.
Each transaction item should include id, borrower_name, borrow_date, due_date, return_date, and status.
Do not expose full user objects in recent_transactions.
acceptance_criteria: Valid QR code returns book details.
Borrower/User response does not contain recent_transactions.
Admin/librarian response contains recent_transactions when available.
Endpoint does not expose passwords or sensitive user data.
verification: Use a known book isbn/library reference from the database.
Call lookup as admin and confirm staff metadata.
Call lookup as borrower and confirm no transaction history.
